zh-CN.name: 字母C
zh-CN.intro: C是字母表里第三个字母。它的形状像一轮弯弯的月亮，也像一块小饼干。我们一起来认识它吧！

story.title: 🌙弯弯的字母C
story.body: 一天，小猫咪咪在厨房里发现了一块奇特的饼干。饼干是弯弯的，像小船，又像月亮。妈妈说：“这是字母C的饼干哦！”咪咪好奇地咬了一口，饼干变成了半圆。咪咪想：C是不是也像张开的小嘴巴呢？后来，咪咪学会了念C：小嘴圆圆，发出“科”的音。C和好朋友A、B一起，排成字母歌。咪咪好开心，它把C贴在了墙上，每天打招呼：“你好，C！”咪咪又用彩笔画了很多C，有的像彩虹桥，有的像小碗。妈妈说C能组成很多词，比如cat（小猫）、car（小车）。咪咪觉得C真奇妙！

knowledge.title: C为什么是弯的？
knowledge.body: 字母C的形状来源于古代腓尼基人的象形文字，它看起来像一条弯曲的骆驼脖子。后来演变成现在的弯弯样子。C是辅音字母，发音很轻快。

en.name: Letter C
en.intro: C is the third letter of the alphabet. It looks like a crescent moon or a cookie. Let's learn about the letter C!

story.title: 🌙The Curvy Letter C
story.body: One day, a little cat named Mimi found a special cookie in the kitchen. The cookie was curved, like a little boat or a moon. Mommy said, 'This is a letter C cookie!' Mimi took a bite, and the cookie became a semicircle. Mimi thought, 'Does C look like an open mouth too?' Later, Mimi learned to say C: round your lips and make a 'kuh' sound. C joined friends A and B to sing the alphabet song. Mimi was so happy and put a big C on the wall. Every day she greeted, 'Hello, C!' Then Mimi used crayons to draw many Cs, like rainbow bridges and little bowls. Mommy said C starts words like cat and car. Mimi thought C was wonderful!

knowledge.title: Why is C curved?
knowledge.body: The shape of the letter C comes from an ancient Phoenician symbol that looked like a curved camel's neck. Over time, it became the curvy letter we know today. C is a consonant with a light sound.
